Done. Here's the summary:

## What was built

**Congress Participation Matrix** at `https://clung.us/congress-matrix`

### Phase 1: Data Analysis
- Analyzed 89 congress session JSON files at `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/sessions/`
- Schema: `session_number`, `topic`, `vote_summary` (19/89 sessions), `evolution` (evolved/fired/retained/created), `rounds` (per-debater participation), `roster`
- 22 unique personas across all sessions, ranging from 65 sessions (Pippi the Pitiless) to 1 session
